---
title: "PEH Data"
toc: false
sidebar: false
page-layout: full
---

<!-- ## Interactive PEH data explorer -->

<!-- The interactive explorer below allows you to browse PEH codebooks and studies. -->
<!-- The application runs on a separate Shiny server and is embedded here for convenience. -->

```{=html}
<style>
/* Break out of Quarto content width */
.peh-embed-wrap {
  width: 100vw;
  margin-left: calc(-50vw + 50%);

  /* KEY FIX: avoid calc(100vh - x) */
  height: 85vh;
  min-height: 900px;
}

/* iframe fills wrapper */
.peh-embed-wrap iframe {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  border: none;
  display: block;
}

/* reduce extra vertical padding above/below */
main.content {
  padding-bottom: 0;
}
</style>

<div class="peh-embed-wrap">
  <iframe
    src="https://vito-epi.shinyapps.io/peh_data/"
    title="PEH Data Explorer"
    loading="lazy"
  ></iframe>
</div>
